creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #3)
Hi!
It is definitely not a high priority issue, so you can postpone it as long as you wish.

One thing to mention is that the purposed patch was created more than a half of a year ago when there were no postgresql16-server port available, so now it is a bit outdated and can not be cleanly applied against the current ports tree.
